facts: A sugar-cube-sized amount of neutron star material weighs about 1 billion tons
The gravitational pull near a neutron star is so strong it warps space within 1 mile
If you got too close, gravity would stretch you like putty over a distance of just 100 football fields
idea.payoff: and we still don't know what's at their core
idea.title: Neutron Stars: Cosmic Crushers 🌀
idea.description: Imagine a force so strong it warps the very fabric of space 🌀. Neutron stars are the cosmic crushers that defy our understanding of gravity. But what secrets lie at their mysterious cores? 🤔 Watch to unravel the enigma of these extreme objects in our universe 🔍

scenes.visual: Deep space background with a faint, distant neutron star subtly pulsating.

scenes.text: A sugar-cube of neutron star material weighs 1 BILLION TONS.
scenes.visual: A sugar cube icon transforms into a tiny, incredibly dense sphere, with a graphic displaying '1 Billion Tons'.

scenes.text: Its gravity warps space within just 1 MILE.
scenes.visual: Abstract representation of spacetime grid bending severely around a central glowing point, illustrating the warping effect. A '1 Mile' radius highlights the distortion.

scenes.text: Get too close: gravity stretches you like putty over 100 football fields.
scenes.visual: A stylized human figure stretching dramatically, elongating towards an unseen powerful gravitational source. Visual of 100 football fields appearing for scale.

scenes.text: AND WE STILL DON'T KNOW WHAT'S AT THEIR CORE.
scenes.visual: A powerful, mysterious swirling vortex graphic representing the unknown core of a neutron star, surrounded by dark space.
